title: BlazeChat
description: The only Chat Filtering mod for Fabric that You Need.
body:
# 🔥 BlazeChat — Focused Chat, Your Way

**Tired of spammy global chat? Want to see only what matters to you?**  
**BlazeChat** is a lightweight, fully client-side Fabric mod that filters chat messages so you can stay focused on friends or key information.

---

### ✨ Features

- **Whitelist or blacklist any name or keyword**  
  BlazeChat can now run in two modes:
  - **Whitelist mode** (default): Only messages containing added keywords will be shown.
  - **Blacklist mode**: Messages containing added keywords will be hidden.

  🔁 Switch anytime with:
  - `/blazechat mode` — Show current mode  
  - `/blazechat mode whitelist` — Switch to whitelist filtering  
  - `/blazechat mode blacklist` — Switch to blacklist filtering

- **Blocked messages are still logged**  
  Hidden messages are printed to the Minecraft log, so you can review them later if needed.

- **Toggle filtering anytime**
  - `/blazechat enable` – Turns filtering on  
  - `/blazechat disable` – Turns filtering off  
  - Configurable **keybind** (not bound by default) to toggle BlazeChat easily

- **Fully client-side**  
  Works on **all servers**, including vanilla – no server mods required!

- **Simple keyword-based commands**
  - `/blazechat addkeyword <word>` – Add a keyword to your filter  
  - `/blazechat removekeyword <word>` – Remove a keyword from your filter  
  - `/blazechat listkeywords` – View all keywords in your filter list

---

### 🛠️ Use Cases

- In **whitelist mode**, filter to see only:
  - Messages from friends or teammates
  - Guild or party mentions
  - Important alerts or your own name

- In **blacklist mode**, block:
  - Spam messages
  - Bots or annoying phrases
  - Unwanted player names or topics

Perfect for busy servers, events, or anyone who just wants a cleaner chat experience.

---

### 📦 Dependencies

This mod **requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**.  
Make sure it's installed to use BlazeChat.

---

### ✅ Permissions

You may include this mod in any modpack, public or private, without asking for permission, as long as proper credit is given.

---
